analysis.title: Classification Map of Function Peak Mechanisms
analysis.objective: Create definitive 2D classification map using M_coh and R_comp metrics

functions.L_chi4: L(s, χ₄) with real character mod 5
functions.L_DH: Davenport-Heilbronn function (a_n = μ(n) for squarefree n, 0 otherwise)

R_comp.formula: |Σ exp(iθ_n)| / count for composite squarefree terms
R_comp.description: Mean resultant length of composite squarefree terms
R_comp.interpretation: Measures phase coherence of composite terms

key_findings: All 200 peaks (100%) show M_coh > 1, confirming universal constructive interference mechanism
R_comp provides primary separation: structured multiplicative (ζ, L(χ₄)) have R_comp ~ 0.002-0.003
All pairwise comparisons show large effect sizes (|Cohen's d| > 0.8)
Four function classes form distinct, separable clusters in (M_coh, R_comp) space
